name: Counter Craft 3 Zombies
description: Counter Craft 3 Zombies features fun and action packed zombie shooting in minecraft world. Use three types of weapons to shoot given amount of zombies and watch out for enemy soldiers and explosives in order to survive and successfully complete each level.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim Mouse Wheel - Change weapon R - Reload Space - Jump TAB - Pause
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, Arcade, Gun, Killing, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Undead, Unity3D, WebGL, Zombie
